content.context: After shipping v0.4.0, the owner identified that mode selection (verbose/concise/caveman) was missing from the onboarding wizard, and that the CLI-generated CLAUDE.md was ignoring the boot field — a bug only visible outside self-hosting. The README was also rewritten from internal documentation to a conversion-focused landing page to support upcoming distribution efforts.
content.decision: Created milestone v0.5.0 as the first formal GitHub milestone. Scope: onboarding mode selection (#30), boot field bug fix (#31), README rewrite for conversion, and issue #11 rescoped for input token optimization.
content.outcome: PR #32 (mode + boot fix) open, PR #33 (README) merged. Milestone targets a quick release (next day after v0.4.0) with fixes that improve both DX and correctness for new users.
